dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Here we are!

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Nice classy place ya got here!

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Thanks, it belonged to my great-granddaddy who had trained others here.

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: The choir had an accident here, so this place is probably haunted.

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Aight then. Ahem-

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Yo! Any of you spooooky~ ghosts out here?! Come on to hear THE BEST CONCERT OF YOUR (un)LIFE!

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: That was cute, BF.

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: TANNER, LOOK! PEOPLE!

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Who might it be no-

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: I BET THEY CAN HELP US!

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Marie, please.. Do you not remember the clo-

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Did you hear that?

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Hello there, kind folks!

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Bee bo bop

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Woah! Who are you two?

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Ah, I suppose I should start,

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: I am Tanner...and this is my older sister, Marie.

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Nice to meet you!

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Oh, well, you too! Im GF, and this is my boyfriend, BF.

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: I have no idea how your parents named you that, but can you help us ascend?

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Yes, as nobody else c-

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Like the guy with the stone jaw or the red goggles killer!

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: How do you think we can help?

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Perhaps a song is in order?

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: BF should be able to provide that!

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: Beep!

dialogue.speaker: hat-tip-speaker
text: SHOW US WHAT YOU'VE GOT!
